title: neomammillaria decipiens
intro: Neomammillaria decipiens, also known as the Mammillaria decipiens, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae, characterized by its small, globular stems and short, fine spines. It is said to possess medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which has been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the sap of Neomammillaria decipiens is often extracted and used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
